name: Jana (Eg) // Um Alla // Ramy
description:
Jana is a Cairo based music producer, DJ and guitarist, bridging the gap between western beats and Arab/ Egyptian sound experimentation, with inspirations from Deconstructed club, Bass music, Hip-hop and underground Egyptian music.
Um Alia Tromsø-based, Copenhagen-born Um Alia surfs the sonic waves from the Arctic to Arabia, flowing through the soundscapes of club, bass, experimental and hiphop. Um Alia is the founder of Klubb Tarab @klubbtarab, an underground club concept in Tromsø which in the past 3 years it's been running, have housed prominent dis and producers from the Arab world, such as 3phaz, Marwa Belhaj Youssef, Hassan Abou Alam, Yas Meen Selectress, Julmud & Haykal, and Jana.
